# resend Provider

The Resend provider allows you to manage Resend resources such as domains and API keys.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The API key for authenticating with the Resend API. Can also be set with the `RESEND_API_KEY` environment variable.
